seoDescription: Facciano HVAC and Sheet Metal — a family-owned, fully licensed heating, cooling, and custom sheet-metal contractor serving Santa Rosa and Sonoma County since 2015.
heroHeading: Santa Rosa's Facciano family HVAC and sheet metal
heroSubheading: A family-owned, fully licensed heating, cooling, and sheet-metal contractor serving Santa Rosa and Sonoma County since 2015.
aboutBody: Facciano HVAC and Sheet Metal is a family-run contractor based in Santa Rosa, owned by Mark and Carl Facciano. The company has been licensed and operating since 2015.

Holding California license #1009408 for warm-air heating, ventilating, air conditioning, and sheet-metal work, the team handles furnace and air-conditioning installation and replacement along with custom sheet-metal fabrication and ductwork for homes across the Santa Rosa area.

services.title: Heating & Furnace Installation
services.description: Installation and replacement of warm-air heating and furnace systems for residential homes.

services.title: Air Conditioning
services.description: AC installation and replacement to keep your home comfortable through Sonoma County summers.

services.title: Sheet Metal & Ductwork
services.description: Custom sheet-metal fabrication and ductwork, backed by a CSLB sheet-metal classification.

notes: Owners Mark & Carl Facciano (CSLB-confirmed → family-run). Est. 2015 (BBB). No reviews/rating/hours/photos found — leans on license + family credential. Phone + address conflict across listings — confirm before send.
